business_problem: TVB—Hong Kong's leading TV broadcasting and on-demand video streaming provider with 5 digital channels (Jade, J2, TVB News, Pearl, TVB Finance & Information) plus myTV SUPER and TVB Anywhere—saw exponential growth in its OTT/direct-to-home customer base. Delivering top-quality service during peak traffic became a significant challenge, requiring elastic scaling, load balancing, and a database with high stability, security, and auto-scaling.
solution_summary: TVB deployed Auto Scaling infrastructure to handle exponential viewership growth across its OTT applications (myTV SUPER, TVB Anywhere) and terrestrial broadcast content delivery. The platform ingests viewer request streams during peak hours, automatically provisioning compute resources across multiple backend servers while reducing infrastructure costs during off-peak periods. PolarDB's cloud-native architecture provides high-stability database performance during scale-out events while reducing data storage costs. The solution improved application availability and end-user experience while optimizing IT operational efficiency and cost-per-transaction for media and entertainment delivery at global scale.
business_outcome: TVB handled sudden traffic spikes via Auto Scaling, optimized IT costs by removing surplus compute during off-peak hours, improved application performance and availability through intelligent load distribution, and met high stability, security, and scaling requirements for its OTT services—while reducing data-storage costs via PolarDB.
metrics: 5 digital TV channels delivered round-the-clock to millions of viewers
architecture_clues: Auto Scaling intelligently provisions and removes compute resources
PolarDB cloud-native relational database compatible with MySQL/PostgreSQL/Oracle
Load balancing across multiple backend servers
evidence_quotes: Leveraging Alibaba Cloud's Auto Scaling service, TVB successfully handled the sudden increase in its applications traffic levels.
TVB also deployed Alibaba Cloud's PolarDB relational database, which can help to address the high stability, data security, and automatic scaling requirements of TVB.

solution_components.name: Auto Scaling
solution_components.role: Intelligent compute provisioning automatically scaling ECS resources based on viewer request volume

solution_components.name: PolarDB
solution_components.role: Cloud-native relational database providing stable performance during traffic fluctuations and scale-out events

data_flow: Viewer requests (OTT/broadcast) → auto scaling decision engine → variable ECS capacity → load-balanced backend servers → PolarDB queries
integration_points: OTT streaming applications (myTV SUPER, TVB Anywhere)
